scene.speaker: Captain Elowen
scene.line: Three attacks. Same hour. Different routes. Whoever designed this wanted you stretched thin.

scene.speaker: Lyria
scene.line: Expanded authority? That is no small favor.

scene.speaker: Kain
scene.line: Ash. Volcanic. Not city resin. This letter passed through ember country before it reached you.

scene.speaker: Captain Elowen
scene.line: I do not like it either, but the orders match official hand. We move and verify on route.

scene.speaker: Aric
scene.line: Then no one moves alone from this point onward.

end_beat: Aric tightens his hand around the seal.
